subject: Inquiry on Strategic Platform Expansion
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to reach out regarding Northwind Analytics' strategic intent to expand into AI and machine learning workloads utilizing your graph data. This is an exciting development that signals a significant shift in your operational capabilities and market positioning.

As you prepare to evaluate the necessary tools and infrastructure for this expansion, I believe it is crucial to discuss the readiness of your current systems and the cluster-scale headroom you will require. Understanding these needs will help us align our support and resources effectively as you move forward with this initiative.

I suggest we schedule a meeting to discuss your specific requirements and how we can assist in facilitating this transition. Please let me know your availability for a conversation in the coming weeks. I look forward to collaborating on this important endeavor.
